subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This, Thy servant, hath been enraptured by the fragrances of Thy sacred and verdant garden, and hath been set ablaze with the fire of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک هذا قد انجذب بنفحات حدیقه قدسک الغناء و اشتعل بنار محبتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God
